# React and ReactDOM — MIT attribution

`react.production.min.js` and `react-dom.production.min.js` in this directory are unmodified production UMD builds of React and ReactDOM v18, distributed by Meta Platforms, Inc. under the MIT license.

Source: https://github.com/facebook/react

## Relationship to AIGovClaw

AIGovClaw is MIT-licensed. React and ReactDOM are included here only as compiled artifacts bundled for single-file dashboard generation. AIGovClaw does not modify the React source. Users preferring a self-built bundle can replace these files with their own React 18 UMD builds.
